Class Deck

java.lang.Object
NonGui.BaseEntity.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Represents the main deck and discard pile in the game. Handles card drawing, discarding, and deck manipulation. Uses JavaFX ObservableList to allow easy data binding with the GUI.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck()
    Initializes a new empty Deck and Discard Pile.

    Method
    Description

    Adds a single card to the main deck.
    void

    Adds multiple copies of the same card to the main deck.

    clearDiscardPile()
    Clears all cards from the discard pile.
    void
    discardCard(BaseCard card)
    Adds a card to the discard pile.
    BaseCard

    Shuffles the deck and draws the top card.

    Gets the entire discard pile list.

    getGameDeck()
    Gets the entire game deck list.

    isDeckEmpty()
    Checks if the main draw deck is empty.

    Shuffles the main game deck randomly.

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      Initializes a new empty Deck and Discard Pile.

  • Method Details

    • addToDeck

      public void addToDeck(BaseCard card)
      Adds a single card to the main deck.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.

    • addToDeck

      public void addToDeck(BaseCard card, int count)
      Adds multiple copies of the same card to the main deck.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.
      count - The number of copies to add.

    • drawCard

      public BaseCard drawCard()
      Shuffles the deck and draws the top card.
      Returns:
      The drawn BaseCard, or null if the deck is empty.

    • isDeckEmpty

      public boolean isDeckEmpty()
      Checks if the main draw deck is empty.
      Returns:
      true if there are no cards left in the deck.

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle()
      Shuffles the main game deck randomly.

    • getGameDeck

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<BaseCard> getGameDeck()
      Gets the entire game deck list.
      Returns:
      The ObservableList representing the draw pile.

    • discardCard

      public void discardCard(BaseCard card)
      Adds a card to the discard pile.
      Parameters:
      card - The card being discarded.

    • getDiscardPile

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<BaseCard> getDiscardPile()
      Gets the entire discard pile list.
      Returns:
      The ObservableList representing the discard pile.

    • clearDiscardPile

      public void clearDiscardPile()
      Clears all cards from the discard pile.
